name: pandoc-wordcount
description: Real word count for Markdown and Quarto files via pandoc --to=plain | wc -w

pandocWordcount.countCode.markdownDescription: Count code as words. When off (the default), code blocks, executable chunks (e.g. ```` ```{r} ````), and inline code are excluded so the count reflects prose — typically what a word limit refers to. When on, all code is counted.
